title: Tarr (disambiguation)
content:
'''Tarr''' may refer to one of the following:

==Canon==
*'''[[Keven Tarr]]''', a [[human]] [[technician]] and [[slicer]]
*'''[[Tarr Kligson]]''', a human [[cyborg]] fixer
*'''[[Tarre Vizsla]]''', a [[Mandalorian warrior]]

==Legends==
*'''[[Tarr Seirr]]''', a [[Cerean/Legends|Cerean]] [[Jedi Knight]]

==Out-of-universe==
*'''[[Babs Tarr]]''', an artist

{{Disambig}}
